findings.note: Remotion render: 2610 frames @ 30fps = 87.06s. Composition: Explainer. Concurrency 8x. Bundled and rendered without missing-asset errors.
Master output: 121 MB, 1920x1080 h264 (yuvj420p), AAC 48kHz stereo 317kbps. Web encode: 58 MB, yuv420p, AAC 192kbps, faststart-enabled for web playback.

Two infrastructure obstacles encountered and resolved cleanly: (1) Remotion default port 3000 was EACCES on this host, switched to 47823. (2) OffthreadVideo refused file:// URIs in current Remotion; symlinked assets into remotion-composer/public/ and rewrote paths to staticFile-relative form.
renderer_family changed from documentary-montage -> explainer-data with logged decision. render_runtime stayed remotion. Visual treatment unchanged.
Final duration 87s vs originally estimated 60s. Per render_report.verification.duration_target_met=false; explanation logged. User accepted during asset stage.
ffprobe pass on both outputs. Audio dynamics applied via Remotion props (music ducking + fades); not separately loudness-normalized via ffmpeg loudnorm.
